---
title: "Detailed LLM Disclosure"
author: "Nikolina Djogova"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
editor: visual
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

I am including the exact prompts I used while working on this project.

1.  I'm working on a data mining project and I am attaching my outline. What code can I run to make sure that my API keys will never get pushed to Git? Explain
2.  This is my 00_setup script. Evaluate it and tell me if i there's anything i need to get rid of or anything i can improve.
3.  After editing my R scripts, I need to close R in order to be able to then reopen it and push the code. If I simply want to push after writing the code, I can't see it.
4.  What's the best way to store an api key and why, explain.
5.  I'm trying to build a request url but I don't want the api key to show when I run it, what's the best way to hide it?
6.  This is my second script. Evaluate it, is there anything I can improve? Anything I should get rid of or any chance to simplify something?
7.  I'm trying to get package metadata and then the granules inside that package. Am I overcomplicating this? Can i write this code in a more simple way?
8.  My function returns error after error. Error during wrapup: URL using bad/illegal format or missing URL: URL rejected: No host part in the URL Error: no more error handlers available (recursive errors?); invoking 'abort' restart. Help me fix it.
9.  Inside the clean dataset I need to remove short entries, let's say less than 50 words. Help me with the code. This is what I have at the moment: dplyr::filter(word_count \< 50).
10.
